use_cases: Action buttons requiring eye-catching animated backgrounds for enhanced CTR
Loading-state buttons with continuous spinning gradient motion
Premium CTA buttons with dynamic visual effects on dark/light themes
Icon buttons with rotating gradient borders for feature highlights
Decorative action triggers with glass-morphism styling
ai_summary: A button component featuring a continuously rotating conic gradient background that creates a mesmerizing spinning effect. The button uses glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-3xl) and supports both light and dark themes with adaptive gradient colors. The animation runs indefinitely via CSS keyframes, making it ideal for premium CTAs, loading states, or attention-grabbing action buttons in modern SaaS applications.
